mapper.select: SELECT tpci.*, partItem.part_comp_item_nm, sf1.file_id as logo_id FROM esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci -- 거래품목명 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_item partItem ON tpci.comp_id = partItem.comp_id AND tpci.part_comp_item = partItem.part_comp_item_id -- 파일 정보 매핑 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = tpci.part_comp_id and sf1.target_type = 'partnerLogo' WHERE 1=1 AND tpci.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY tpci.use_yn DESC, tpci.ord_seq

SELECT tpci.*, partItem.part_comp_item_nm, partItem.part_comp_item_id, hrPSH.hr_nm as part_sh_hr_nm, sf1.file_id as file_id, sf2.file_id as file_id2, sf3.file_id as part_sh_hr_img_id FROM esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci -- 거래품목명 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_item partItem ON tpci.comp_id = partItem.comp_id AND tpci.part_comp_item = partItem.part_comp_item_id -- 협력사 안전보건 관리 책임자명 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hrPSH on hrPSH.hr_id = tpci.part_sh_hr_id -- 파일 logo LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf1 on sf1.target_id = #{searchText} and sf1.target_type='partnerLogo' AND sf1.comp_id = #{compId} -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf2 on sf2.target_id = #{searchText} and sf2.target_type='partnerLocation' AND sf2.comp_id = #{compId} -- 파일 location LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf3 on sf3.target_id = tpci.part_sh_hr_id and sf3.target_type='hrImg' WHERE 1=1 AND tpci.part_comp_id = #{searchText}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(part_comp_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as part_comp_id from esg.tb_partner_comp_info where part_comp_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_partner_comp_info ( comp_id, part_comp_id, part_comp_item, part_comp_nm, rgst_no, rpst_nm, email, tel_no, fax_no, biz_cd, biz_nm, zip_cd, addrs1, addrs2, ord_seq, "desc", part_sh_hr_id, created_at, created_by, use_yn, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{partCompId}, #{partCompItem}, #{partCompNm}, #{rgstNo}, #{rpstNm}, #{email}, #{telNo}, #{faxNo}, #{bizCd}, #{bizNm}, #{zipCd}, #{addrs1}, #{addrs2}, #{ordSeq}, #{desc}, #{partShHrId}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{useYn}, #{regDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_partner_comp_info SET part_comp_item = #{partCompItem}, part_comp_nm = #{partCompNm}, rgst_no = #{rgstNo}, rpst_nm = #{rpstNm}, email = #{email}, tel_no = #{telNo}, fax_no = #{faxNo}, biz_cd = #{bizCd}, biz_nm = #{bizNm}, zip_cd = #{zipCd}, addrs1 = #{addrs1}, addrs2 = #{addrs2}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, "desc" = #{desc}, part_sh_hr_id = #{partShHrId}, use_yn = #{useYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, reg_dt = #{regDt} WHERE part_comp_id = #{partCompId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_partner_comp_info WHERE 1=1 AND part_comp_id = #{partCompId}
select t1.* from esg.tb_partner_comp_item t1 where t1.comp_id = #{compId} order by use_yn desc, ord_seq ASC

select t1.*, t1.remark as desc from dataset.tb_dataset_partner_comp_item t1
where t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by t1.ord_seq asc
mapper.insert:
select case when #{partCompItemId} is null or #{partCompItemId} = '' then to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((coalesce(max(substring(part_comp_item_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0') else #{partCompItemId} end as partCompItemId from esg.tb_partner_comp_item where part_comp_item_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' and comp_id = #{compId}
insert into esg.tb_partner_comp_item ( comp_id, part_comp_item_id, part_comp_item_nm, ord_seq, use_yn, remark, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{compId}, #{partCompItemId}, #{partCompItemNm}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
